title: FIX-08: README.md idempotent regeneration from application_details.md files
description: Gap 8 fix. Replace README append logic with a full regeneration script. On every push, script recursively reads all Sync/<Company>/<Role>/application_details.md files, extracts (company, role, score, gh-pages-url, date), and rebuilds the entire README.md dashboard table from scratch. No append operations. Acceptance: running the script 10 times produces identical output.
close_reason: FIX-08 implemented: idempotent README regeneration in Phase 6.10

title: TASK-F5: HTML + CSS resume build
description: Build Satvik_Jain_[Company]_[Role].html + .css using single-column ATS-safe HTML. CSS custom properties :root { --brand-primary, --brand-secondary, --brand-accent } for brand colors. Print to PDF via browser. No LaTeX, no Python needed.

description: Gap 15 fix. Update activate-sync.md Step 4 Docker startup command to: docker run -d --name chroma -v chroma_data:/chroma/chroma -p 8000:8000 chromadb/chroma. Add collection.count() health check on every session start. If count=0, auto-trigger Step 1.2 re-ingestion. Add JSON backup export after every ingestion session. Acceptance: docker restart preserves all ChromaDB data.
close_reason: FIX-15 implemented: named Docker volume + health check + JSON backup in activate-sync

title: FIX-03: Puppeteer headless render for deterministic PDF validation
description: Gap 3 fix. Add a Puppeteer step after Phase 6.8 compression pass. Script: npx puppeteer renders resume.html to PDF, extracts page count, fails if > 1 page. Saves validation_report.json in Sync/<Company>/<Role>/. Acceptance: script runs on CI, catches overflow that visual check would miss.
close_reason: FIX-03 implemented: Puppeteer headless validation in Phase 6.8

title: FIX-04: ChromaDB retrieval spot-check before Phase 6 drafting
description: Gap 4 fix. After ChromaDB returns top-8 signals (Epic 4.4), show user a formatted list: 'I will use these 8 experience signals to write your resume. Confirm / re-rank / replace any.' Gate: user must confirm or modify before content draft starts. Acceptance: no resume is drafted without explicit user confirmation of signals.
close_reason: FIX-04 implemented: retrieval spot-check gate before Phase 6.2

Acceptance: no single JD gap loop exceeds 3 questions.
